'''鈭歠-th-g''' ('''fathaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:celestialize|celestialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:celestialize|celestialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-th-g
|-
! Lemma
| fathaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fathagithi|fathagithi]] || [[word:fathagiji|fathagiji]] || [[word:fathagishi|fathagishi]] || [[word:fathagi|fathagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathaguthuth|fathaguthuth]] || [[word:fathagujuj|fathagujuj]] || [[word:fathagushush|fathagushush]] || [[word:fathag|fathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathaguthu|fathaguthu]] || [[word:fathaguju|fathaguju]] || [[word:fathagushu|fathagushu]] || [[word:fathagu|fathagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathagufuth|fathagufuth]] || [[word:fathagufuj|fathagufuj]] || [[word:fathagufush|fathagufush]] || [[word:fathaguf|fathaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fathagethe|fathagethe]] || [[word:fathageje|fathageje]] || [[word:fathageshe|fathageshe]] || [[word:fathage|fathage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathagothoth|fathagothoth]] || [[word:fathagojoj|fathagojoj]] || [[word:fathagoshosh|fathagoshosh]] || [[word:fathag|fathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathagotho|fathagotho]] || [[word:fathagojo|fathagojo]] || [[word:fathagosho|fathagosho]] || [[word:fathago|fathago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathagofoth|fathagofoth]] || [[word:fathagofoj|fathagofoj]] || [[word:fathagofosh|fathagofosh]] || [[word:fathagof|fathagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fathag忙th忙|fathag忙th忙]] || [[word:fathag忙j忙|fathag忙j忙]] || [[word:fathag忙sh忙|fathag忙sh忙]] || [[word:fathag忙|fathag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathagathath|fathagathath]] || [[word:fathagajaj|fathagajaj]] || [[word:fathagashash|fathagashash]] || [[word:fathag|fathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathagatha|fathagatha]] || [[word:fathagaja|fathagaja]] || [[word:fathagasha|fathagasha]] || [[word:fathaga|fathaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathagafath|fathagafath]] || [[word:fathagafaj|fathagafaj]] || [[word:fathagafash|fathagafash]] || [[word:fathagaf|fathagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fathagasha|fathagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofathagasha|gofathagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifathagasha|gokifathagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fathagn眉sha|fathagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofathagnkn眉sha|gofathagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifathagn眉sha|gokifathagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fathagsh毛sha|fathagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofathagnksh毛sha|gofathagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifathagsh毛sha|gokifathagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fathagrosha|fathagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofathagnkrosha|gofathagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifathagrosha|gokifathagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fathagmusha|fathagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofathagnkmusha|gofathagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathagmusha|gokifathagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fathagsherasha|fathagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofathagnksherasha|gofathagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifathagsherasha|gokifathagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fathagngasha|fathagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofathagnkngasha|gofathagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifathagngasha|gokifathagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fathagyasha|fathagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofathagnkyasha|gofathagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifathagyasha|gokifathagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fathagyamasha|fathagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofathagnkyamasha|gofathagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifathagyamasha|gokifathagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fathagn眉sh毛sha|fathagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofathagnkn眉sh毛sha|gofathagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifathagn眉sh毛sha|gokifathagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fathagn眉rosha|fathagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofathagnkn眉rosha|gofathagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifathagn眉rosha|gokifathagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathagn眉musha|fathagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofathagnkn眉musha|gofathagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathagn眉musha|gokifathagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fathagsh毛n眉sha|fathagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofathagnksh毛n眉sha|gofathagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifathagsh毛n眉sha|gokifathagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fathagsh毛rosha|fathagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofathagnksh毛rosha|gofathagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifathagsh毛rosha|gokifathagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathagsh毛musha|fathagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofathagnksh毛musha|gofathagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathagsh毛musha|gokifathagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fathagron眉sha|fathagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofathagnkron眉sha|gofathagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifathagron眉sha|gokifathagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fathagrosh毛sha|fathagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofathagnkrosh毛sha|gofathagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifathagrosh毛sha|gokifathagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fathagromusha|fathagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofathagnkromusha|gofathagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifathagromusha|gokifathagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fathagmun眉sha|fathagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofathagnkmun眉sha|gofathagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifathagmun眉sha|gokifathagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fathagmush毛sha|fathagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofathagnkmush毛sha|gofathagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifathagmush毛sha|gokifathagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fathagmurosha|fathagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofathagnkmurosha|gofathagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifathagmurosha|gokifathagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fathag|fathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙th忙g|f忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofathag|hofathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙th忙g|hof忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofathag|hohofathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙th忙g|hohof忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fathag|n眉fathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙th忙g|n眉f忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fathag|n眉n眉fathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙th忙g|n眉n眉f忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fathag|n茂fathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙th忙g|n茂f忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fathag|n茂n茂fathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙th忙g|n茂n茂f忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufathag|lufathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙th忙g|luf忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufathag|lulufathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙th忙g|luluf忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifathag|lifathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙th忙g|lif忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifathag|lilifathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙th忙g|lilif忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofathag|kofathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙th忙g|kof忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofathag|kokofathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙th忙g|kokof忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefathag|kefathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙th忙g|kef忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefathag|kekefathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙th忙g|kekef忙th忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
